zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Northwode於1310年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾爾姆斯利時，她的父親Sir John Northwode II31歲，母親Agnes de Grandison22歲。她於1344年與Marmaduke Thweng在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1345年在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾爾姆斯利享年35歲。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Northwode was born in 1310, in Helmsley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Northwode II, was 31 and her mother, Agnes de Grandison, was 22. She married Marmaduke Thweng in 1344, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1345, in Helmsley, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Northwode est née en 1310, à Helmsley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Northwode II, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Grandison, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Marmaduke Thweng en 1344, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1345, à Helmsley, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Northwode 1310 in Helmsley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Northwode II 31 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Grandison 22. Sie hat 1344 in England Marmaduke Thweng geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1345 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Helmsley, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Northwodeが1310年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヘルムスリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Northwode IIは31歳，母Agnes de Grandisonは22歳であった。1344年にイギリスでMarmaduke Thwengと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1345年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアヘルムスリーで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Northwode(이)가 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 헬슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Northwode II(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Grandison(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1344년 영국에서 Marmaduke Thweng(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1345년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 헬슬리에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Northwode родилась в 1310 г. в местности хелмсли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Northwode II было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Grandison, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Marmaduke Thweng в 1344 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1345 г. в местности хелмсли, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Northwode nació en 1310, en Helmsley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Northwode II, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Agnes de Grandison, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Marmaduke Thweng en 1344, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1345, en Helmsley, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 35 años.
